input_artifacts.content:
From: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-20 13:09 EST
Subject: Re: security posture Discussion - Next Steps

Just checking in on the security posture proposal. Our Head of Digital is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
To: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
Date: 2024-02-05 15:49 EST
Subject: security posture - Action Required

I wanted to follow up on our conversation about security posture. Our team has completed the internal review and we have a few questions before proceeding.

---
From: Laura Anderson <laura.anderson@lucernepubli.com>
To: Tom Rodriguez <tom.rodriguez@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-03 15:07 EST
Subject: security posture - Action Required

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with security posture. What are the next steps from your side?

Meeting: security posture Discussion - Lucerne Publishing
Date: 2024-03-15
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Laura Anderson (Lucerne Publishing), Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft)

[00:01:30] Laura Anderson (Lucerne Publishing): Thanks everyone for joining. Let's dive into security posture.

[00:05:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): On the security posture front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around performance requirements.

[00:09:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): The timeline for integration complexity is aggressive. We need to validate the assumptions.

[00:13:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is performance requirements.

[00:18:00] Laura Anderson (Lucerne Publishing): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about stakeholder alignment. Can we address those?

[00:21:00] Laura Anderson (Lucerne Publishing): I agree with that assessment. From our side, the main concern is timeline constraints.

[00:26:00] Laura Anderson (Lucerne Publishing): Our team lead reviewed this and has concerns about cost optimization. Can we address those?

[00:30:00] Laura Anderson (Lucerne Publishing): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about timeline constraints. Can we address those?

[00:35:00] Tom Rodriguez (Microsoft): Let me add some context -- we've been working on performance requirements and found that there's a compliance requirement we hadn't accounted for in the original scope.
